serve.description: Run and serve the site for development

og.description: Render Open Graph social-share cards from _og/*.html into assets/img/og/
og.command: google-chrome --headless --disable-gpu --hide-scrollbars --force-device-scale-factor=1 --window-size=1200,720 --screenshot=_og/home.png "file://$(pwd)/_og/home.html" && magick _og/home.png -crop 1200x630+0+0 +repage -strip -quality 88 -sampling-factor 4:2:0 -interlace JPEG assets/img/og/home.jpg && echo 'Rendered: assets/img/og/home.jpg'

avatar.description: Render YouTube channel avatar from _og/avatar.html into assets/img/avatar/256.png
avatar.command: mkdir -p assets/img/avatar && google-chrome --headless --disable-gpu --hide-scrollbars --force-device-scale-factor=1 --window-size=800,880 --screenshot=_og/avatar.png "file://$(pwd)/_og/avatar.html" && magick _og/avatar.png -crop 800x800+0+0 +repage -strip assets/img/avatar/256.png && echo 'Rendered: assets/img/avatar/256.png'

banner.description: Render YouTube channel banner from _og/banner.html into assets/img/banner/256-banner.jpg
banner.command: mkdir -p assets/img/banner && google-chrome --headless --disable-gpu --hide-scrollbars --force-device-scale-factor=1 --window-size=2560,1530 --screenshot=_og/banner.png "file://$(pwd)/_og/banner.html" && magick _og/banner.png -crop 2560x1440+0+0 +repage -strip -quality 90 -sampling-factor 4:2:0 -interlace JPEG assets/img/banner/256-banner.jpg && echo 'Rendered: assets/img/banner/256-banner.jpg'
